rationale: Acting on Review 1 produces the better PR: its finding correctly identifies that the added `aut_mul_self_eq_one` (diff lines 43-44) uses nonstandard `mul_self_eq_one`/`σ * σ = 1` naming and proof-site `rw [pow_two]` (line 69) where Mathlib uses `sq_eq_one`/`^2` (per the cited lemmas), a real material naming inconsistency in this new file; following it yields cleaner consistent code while Review 2's approval leaves the suboptimal names unchanged.
